settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDescription: Choose a language for Sociol. Device language is used when set to System.
settings.appearanceDescription: Choose how Sociol looks on this device.
settings.regionDescription: Used for dates, time, numbers, currency, distance, and future regional content.
profile.title: Profile
profile.staffNote: You can use Sociol normally. These tools are only opened when you need them.
profile.logoutMessage: You'll need to sign back in to access your Circle and chats.
notifications.description: Choose what reaches you. We keep it quiet by default.
notifications.circleActivity.title: Circle activity
notifications.circleActivity.body: Joins, swipes back, when your Circle fills.
notifications.newMessages.title: New messages
notifications.mutualMatches.title: Mutual matches
notifications.suggestions.title: Suggestions for you
notifications.suggestions.body: New people and Circles near you.
notifications.productUpdates.title: Product updates
notifications.quietHours.title: Quiet hours
notifications.loadError.title: Could not load settings
notifications.saveError.title: Setting not saved
notifications.emptyText: Circle updates, matches, and messages will show up here.
notification.circleComplete.title: Your Circle is complete!
notification.circleAlmostFull.title: Circle almost full
notification.circleAlmostFull.body: 1 more person to fill your Circle.
notification.circleAccepted.title: {{actorName}} accepted
notification.circleAccepted.joinerBody: You both wanted to be in {{circleName}}.
notification.circleInvite.title: {{actorName}} wants to join
notification.message.title: {{senderName}}
validation.profilePhotoRequired: Add a profile photo before verifying it.
